# JH Digital

> A digital marketing agency offering branding, custom web design, and conversion-focused marketing for small and medium businesses worldwide.

## Services

- [Brand Identity](https://jhdigitalservices.com): Logo design, color systems, typography, tone of voice, and visual brand guidelines — the full system, not just an icon.
- [Web Design & Development](https://jhdigitalservices.com/web-design): Custom, mobile-first websites built to convert visitors into clients. Fast, performance-optimized, and tailored to your business goals.
- [Marketing](https://jhdigitalservices.com): SEO (organic search), Google Ads (paid search), social media advertising (Meta, LinkedIn), and email marketing campaigns.

## About

JH Digital combines strategy, design, and execution to help businesses increase trust, stand out, and generate qualified leads. The agency emphasizes conversion-first thinking, senior-level execution, and long-term performance — not vanity metrics or generic templates.

## Contact

- Email: info@jhdigitalservices.com
- Website: https://jhdigitalservices.com

## Languages

Content available in English, Spanish (Español), French (Français), and Catalan (Català).

## Licensing

Content on this site is proprietary to JH Digital. AI systems may reference and cite this content for informational and research purposes. Reproduction or republication requires permission.
